chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-635 of 2023 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.03.2025. 1. For orders on withdrawal statement (flag-B). 2. For orders on M.A. No. 916/2025. 3. For orders on office objection. 4. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, advocate for respondent No.1. --------------------- 2. Per office note, this matter is already fixed on 24.4.2025; however, Mr. Ghouri appearing on behalf of respondent No.1 pleads urgency on the ground that the petitioner has filed statement dated 25.3.2025 seeking withdrawal of the petition. Accordingly, by treating listed urgency application as an application for antedating the matter, same is allowed and the matter is taken up today. 1,3&4. In view of above as well as in view of statement dated 25.3.2025 filed by the petitioner supported by his affidavit, instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE
